hero.description: Health, networking, and female energy. Discover the most dynamic and accessible team sport for women!

quick_entry.what_is_it_desc: Briefly about the main rules of CATCH'N SERVE BALL.

the_game.subtitle: 5 reasons why thousands of women around the world choose CATCH'N SERVE BALL.
the_game.catch_desc: You must catch the ball with both hands, not hit it. It's safe for joints.
the_game.touch_desc: The game is built on 3 classic passes, developing smart tactics.
the_game.dynamic_desc: No one stands idle, there is always active interaction on the court.
the_game.access_desc: The sport is suitable for any fitness level and age.
the_game.social_desc: CATCH'N SERVE BALL is a powerful community of ambitious women.

clubs_section.subtitle: Choose your city and join the training this week.

bottom_cta.title: Ready to try your first game?
bottom_cta.subtitle: Sign up for your first introductory training. We provide the uniform, the ball, and great company to start!

footer.desc: The main digital hub of the women's sports community in Cyprus. Join the game, find your club, and stay fit!
footer.contact_msg: I want to know more about the club...

rules_page.subtitle: The sport that unites. Basic principles of the game.
rules_page.diff_1_html: The ball must be caught with both hands and held for no more than one second.
rules_page.diff_2: Hitting the ball with your hands (like in volleyball) is prohibited. This significantly reduces the risk of injury to joints and fingers.
rules_page.diff_3: The attack is carried out by throwing the ball with one or two hands.
rules_page.diff_4: The team has the right to 3 touches before transferring the ball to the opponent's side.
rules_page.diff_5: The net is located at a height of 2.24 m (standard women's height).
rules_page.ethics_desc: CATCH'N SERVE BALL is first and foremost about respect, female support, and fair play. We do not accept aggression on the court.
rules_page.ethics_2: Help newcomers get comfortable on the court.
rules_page.ethics_3: Play for health and team enjoyment.
rules_page.docs_desc: Full competition regulations and Association charter (PDF).

events_page.subtitle: Championship matches, open trainings, and master classes.

president.name: Danae Loizou
president.role: President, CYPRUS CATCH'N SERVE BALL FEDERATION
president.bio: Danae Loizou is the driving force behind the sport's growth in Cyprus. A former volleyball player, she discovered Catch' N Serve Ball in 2017 as a player and experienced firsthand its profound impact on women's lives.
president.role1_text: Official ICSBF representative in Cyprus and elected member of the International Rules Committee — shaping the sport's global regulations.
president.role2_text: Strategic ties with sports organisations across Europe and Israel.
president.role3_text: Licensed Coach, Multiplier and Referee Mentor — ensuring high standards for matches in Cyprus.
president.role4_text: Having served as player, coach, referee and executive, she deeply understands the needs of women over 30 and mothers seeking health, empowerment and community.
president.quote: Catch' N Serve Ball is more than just a game — it is our community. We are building an environment where every woman in Cyprus can feel like an athlete again, regardless of age.

about.title: About CYPRUS CATCH'N SERVE BALL FEDERATION
about.subtitle: Building a community through sport
about.mission_text: CYPRUS CATCH'N SERVE BALL FEDERATION unites clubs and players across the island to develop and promote CATCH'N SERVE BALL as an inclusive, dynamic team sport. We organize tournaments, support coaches, and welcome everyone — regardless of age or experience.
